sourcesContent:
# composition-and-boundary fixture: interpolation, heredocs,
# regexes, unicode identifiers in every applicable matrix position with
# trivia at block boundaries. Statement-position row included (a bare
# interpolated string is a valid expression statement). Inapplicable:
# regex literals as call callees are nonsense; heredoc delimiters cannot
# nest inside interpolations of the same kind this wave.
def shout(msg)
  return "#{msg}!"

who = "crowd"
m1 = "Hello #{who}".length
c1 = shout("hey #{who}")
v1 = "#{who} says #{"hi #{who}"}"
ix = "abc#{who}"[0]
rx = /abc/.source
n1 = "#{1 + 2}"

if who
  t1 = """
    inside #{who}
  """

# trivia at a block boundary

while who && who.length > 99

  # trivia inside a block
  who = ""

"statement #{who}"
café = shout("naïve #{who}")
